rationale: The current translation (from the Qwen candidate) is excellent. It successfully captures the satirical and aggressive tone of the original English text ('plus de coups à foutre', 'pisser dans une bouteille'). It correctly preserved all MDX components, including the complex Timeline data structure and the book list schema. The previous judge's suggestions for 'manants' and 'amateurs' have already been incorporated into the current version of the file.

suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.reason: The translation 'Des paysans plus rapides' is too literal. 'Plus vite, manants !' better captures the satirical, condescending tone of 'Faster peasants!' in a corporate context.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.

suggestionLog.reason: While 'fumiers' is punchy, 'amateurs' is closer to the source 'amateurs' and fits the corporate satire of the book 'What Got You Here Won't Get You There' better.
suggestionLog.note: Applied exact replacement to selected MDX.
